item.tribulation.shatter_shard.tooltip: Right-click to lower your difficulty level.
item.tribulation.shatter_shard.info.drop: Drops from hostile mobs scaled to level %1$s+ with a %2$s%% chance per kill.
item.tribulation.shatter_shard.info.cons: Right-click to consume and reduce your difficulty level by %s.
item.tribulation.shatter_shard.info.side: Applies Slowness II, Mining Fatigue II, and Weakness II for 10 seconds.
item.tribulation.shatter_shard.info.conf: All values are configurable by the server operator.
message.tribulation.level_up: Your difficulty has risen to level %s.
message.tribulation.level_up_intro: Your difficulty rises the longer you survive — mobs near you grow stronger with it.
message.tribulation.level_up_tier: Your difficulty has risen to level %s (Tier %s).
message.tribulation.level_max: You have reached the maximum difficulty level.
message.tribulation.level_decay: You were away %s days — your difficulty eased from level %s to %s.
message.tribulation.blood_moon_no_sleep: You cannot sleep during a Blood Moon.
hud.tribulation.tier_detail.title: TRIBULATION
config.tribulation.title: Tribulation Configuration
config.tribulation.hud.enabled.tooltip: Show the level badge overlay. Default: true.
config.tribulation.hud.anchor.tooltip: Screen corner: TOP_LEFT, TOP_RIGHT, BOTTOM_LEFT, BOTTOM_RIGHT. Default: TOP_LEFT.
config.tribulation.hud.offset_x.tooltip: Horizontal pixels from the anchored edge. Default: 4.
config.tribulation.hud.offset_y.tooltip: Vertical pixels from the anchored edge. Default: 4.
config.tribulation.general.level_up_tick: Ticks of playtime per level (72000 = 1 hour). Default: 72000.
config.tribulation.general.mob_detection: Range (blocks) to find the player(s) that drive a mob's scaling. Default: 32.0.
Which player level drives a mob when several are in range: NEAREST, AVERAGE, or MAX. Default: NEAREST.
config.tribulation.general.notify_level_: Show chat message on level up. Default: true.
Show Tier in Level Up Message
Include tier info in level-up notification. Default: true.
Whether player level affects mob stats. Default: true.
config.tribulation.distance_scaling.enab: Enable distance scaling axis. Default: true.
config.tribulation.distance_scaling.star: Blocks from spawn before scaling begins. Default: 1000.
config.tribulation.distance_scaling.incr: Blocks per additional factor step. Default: 300.
config.tribulation.distance_scaling.excl: Only apply in the Overworld. Default: true.
config.tribulation.height_scaling.enable: Enable height scaling axis. Default: true.
config.tribulation.height_scaling.height: Blocks of Y deviation per step. Default: 30.
config.tribulation.height_scaling.positi: Scale mobs above baseline. Default: true.
config.tribulation.height_scaling.negati: Scale mobs below baseline. Default: true.
config.tribulation.height_scaling.exclud: Only apply in the Overworld. Default: true.
Enable moon-phase scaling axis. Default: true.
config.tribulation.moon_scaling.max_bonu: Bonus factor at the full moon (0 disables the axis). Default: 0.1.
config.tribulation.moon_scaling.surface_: Only apply to mobs at or above surfaceY. Default: false.
Minimum Y for the bonus when surfaceOnly is on. Default: 63.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.enabled.to: Enable Blood Moon events — rare full-moon nights of heightened danger. Default: true.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.chance.too: Probability that a full-moon night becomes a Blood Moon (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.25.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.moon_bonus: Multiplier applied to the moon-phase scaling bonus during a Blood Moon. Default: 3.0.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.spawn_cap_: Multiplier applied to the hostile mob spawn cap during a Blood Moon. Default: 2.0.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.block_slee: Prevent players from sleeping through a Blood Moon. Default: true.
config.tribulation.blood_moon.client_eff: Show the red sky tint and play the warning sound when a Blood Moon rises. Default: true.
config.tribulation.group_health_bonus.en: Grant mobs bonus health for each additional nearby player. Default: false.
config.tribulation.group_health_bonus.pe: Health factor added per extra player in range. Default: 0.2.
config.tribulation.group_health_bonus.ma: Maximum total group health bonus factor. Default: 1.0.
config.tribulation.abilities.zombie_rein: Call nearby zombies when hit. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.skeleton_sw: Switch to melee at close range. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.spider_web_: Place cobwebs near targets. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.spider_crop: Destroy crops while chasing. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.spider_leap: Leap attack at range. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.husk_hunger: Apply hunger effect on hit. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.wither_skel: Set targets on fire. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.drowned_tri: Always carry and throw trident. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.stray_slown: Upgrade arrows to Slowness II. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.bogged_pois: Upgrade arrows to Poison II. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.witch_linge: Throw lingering potions instead of splash. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.witch_aggre: Drink healing potions sooner and more often. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.pillager_qu: Quick Charge on the held crossbow. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.pillager_mu: Multishot on the held crossbow. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.vindicator_: Break wooden doors on any difficulty. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.guardian_fa: Charge the attack beam faster. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.ravager_roa: Wider roar knockback radius. Default: true.
config.tribulation.abilities.silverfish_: Summon silverfish from infested blocks when hurt. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.unlisted_: Apply fallback scaling to hostile mobs not individually listed below. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.zombie.to: Scale the Zombie when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
Scale the Skeleton when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.creeper.t: Scale the Creeper when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.spider.to: Scale the Spider when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.cave_spid: Scale the Cave Spider when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.endermite: Scale the Endermite when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.silverfis: Scale the Silverfish when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.drowned.t: Scale the Drowned when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.husk.tool: Scale the Husk when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.stray.too: Scale the Stray when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
Scale the Pillager when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.vindicato: Scale the Vindicator when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.witch.too: Scale the Witch when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.wither_sk: Scale the Wither Skeleton when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
Scale the Guardian when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.hoglin.to: Scale the Hoglin when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.zoglin.to: Scale the Zoglin when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.ravager.t: Scale the Ravager when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.piglin.to: Scale the Piglin when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.zombified: Scale the Zombified Piglin when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
config.tribulation.mob_toggles.bogged.to: Scale the Bogged when Tribulation is active. Default: true.
Enable death level reduction. Default: true.
config.tribulation.death_relief.minimum_: Level floor (will not reduce below this). Default: 0.
config.tribulation.level_decay.enabled.t: Reduce a player's difficulty level while they are offline. Default: false.
config.tribulation.level_decay.grace_day: Days a player can stay offline before decay begins. Default: 7.0.
config.tribulation.level_decay.levels_pe: Levels Lost per Day Beyond Grace
Levels lost per day offline beyond the grace period. Default: 2.0.
config.tribulation.level_decay.floor.too: Lowest level offline decay can reduce a player to. Default: 0.
config.tribulation.shards.drop_start_lev: Minimum player level for shards to drop. Default: 25.
config.tribulation.shards.shard_power.to: Levels reduced when consuming a shard. Default: 5.
config.tribulation.shards.side_effects.t: Apply debuffs on shard use. Default: true.
config.tribulation.special_zombies.big_z: Percent chance for big variant. Default: 10.
Flat health added to big variants. Default: 10.
Flat attack damage added to big variants. Default: 2.
Speed multiplier for big variants (below 1 = slower). Default: 0.7.
config.tribulation.special_zombies.speed: Percent chance for speed variant. Default: 10.
Speed multiplier for speed zombies. Default: 1.3.
Flat health subtracted from speed variants. Default: 10.
config.tribulation.special_skeletons.dea: Percent chance for deadeye variant. Default: 10.
Ticks between deadeye shots (lower is faster). Default: 20.
config.tribulation.special_skeletons.bru: Percent chance for brute variant. Default: 10.
Ticks between brute shots (higher is slower). Default: 60.
config.tribulation.bosses.max_factor.too: Maximum total factor for bosses. Default: 3.0.
config.tribulation.bosses.distance_facto: Distance scaling rate for bosses. Default: 0.1.
config.tribulation.bosses.time_factor.to: Time scaling rate for bosses. Default: 0.3.
config.tribulation.xp.xp_multiplier.tool: Bonus XP gain on mob difficulty: dropped XP = base × (1 + healthFactor × xpMultiplier). 0 disables the bonus. Default: 1.0.
config.tribulation.champions.enabled.too: Enable rare champion mobs with bonus stats and affixes. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.level_thres: Minimum player difficulty level before champions can spawn. Default: 50.
config.tribulation.champions.champion_ch: Probability an eligible mob spawns as a champion (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.05.
config.tribulation.champions.max_affixes: Maximum number of affixes a champion can roll. Default: 2.
config.tribulation.champions.health_mult: Health multiplier applied on top of normal scaling. Default: 1.5.
config.tribulation.champions.damage_mult: Damage multiplier applied on top of normal scaling. Default: 1.25.
config.tribulation.champions.xp_multipli: XP multiplier for killing a champion. Default: 3.0.
config.tribulation.champions.bonus_loot_: Extra loot-table rolls granted on a champion's death. Default: 1.
config.tribulation.champions.show_name_t: Show the champion's generated name above its head. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.particle_au: Emit an ambient particle aura around champions. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.affix_vampi: Allow the Vampiric affix — heals the champion when it deals damage. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.vampiric_he: Fraction of damage dealt healed back by the Vampiric affix. Default: 0.5.
config.tribulation.champions.affix_explo: Allow the Explosive affix — the champion explodes on death. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.explosive_p: Explosion power of the Explosive affix. Default: 2.0.
config.tribulation.champions.affix_knock: Allow the Knockback Aura affix — periodically repels nearby players. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.knockback_a: Knockback strength of the Knockback Aura affix. Default: 0.8.
Radius (blocks) of the Knockback Aura affix. Default: 4.0.
Ticks between Knockback Aura pulses. Default: 60.
config.tribulation.champions.affix_thorn: Allow the Thorns affix — reflects a fraction of melee damage. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.thorns_frac: Fraction of incoming melee damage reflected by the Thorns affix. Default: 0.3.
config.tribulation.champions.affix_regen: Allow the Regenerating affix — the champion steadily heals. Default: true.
config.tribulation.champions.regen_healt: Health regenerated per second by the Regenerating affix. Default: 1.0.
config.tribulation.hardcore_hearts.enabl: Enable hardcore hearts system. Default: false.
config.tribulation.hardcore_hearts.heart: Half-hearts restored per Heart Fragment. Default: 2.
config.tribulation.soul_inventory.enable: Enable soul inventory system. Default: false.
config.tribulation.soul_inventory.soulbo: Enchantment ID that protects items. Default: tribulation:soulbound.
config.tribulation.soul_inventory.destro: Also destroy XP on death. Default: false.
config.tribulation.soul_inventory.respec: Skip destruction if keepInventory is on. Default: true.
config.tribulation.totems.counts_as_deat: Totem Pop Counts as Death Relief
Apply Death Relief level loss when a totem saves you. Default: false.
config.tribulation.totems.protects_heart: Shield Hardcore Hearts loss when a totem saves you; set false to take the penalty anyway. Default: true.
config.tribulation.armor.enabled.tooltip: Enable tier-driven armor equipment. Default: true.
config.tribulation.armor.material_roll_m: Roll once per mob or once per slot: PER_MOB, PER_SLOT. Default: PER_MOB.
config.tribulation.armor.drop_chance.too: Drop probability [0.0, 2.0]. 1.0+ is guaranteed and pristine. Default: 0.0.
config.tribulation.armor.armor_ceiling.t: Maximum armor points from Tribulation gear. Default: 24.0.
config.tribulation.armor.toughness_ceili: Maximum toughness from Tribulation gear. Default: 15.0.
config.tribulation.weapon.enabled.toolti: Enable tier-driven weapon upgrades. Default: true.
config.tribulation.weapon.drop_chance.to: Drop probability [0.0, 2.0]. 1.0+ is guaranteed and pristine. Default: 0.0.
config.tribulation.weapon.damage_ceiling: Maximum base damage from Tribulation weapons. Default: 20.0.
config.tribulation.trial_spawner.enabled: Apply Tribulation scaling (attributes, abilities, equipment) to trial-spawned mobs. When false, trial spawners behave exactly like vanilla. Default: true.
config.tribulation.trial_spawner.ominous: Allow activated spawners to roll into ominous mode with no Bad Omen effect. Default: false.
Per-activation roll chance [0.0, 1.0] once the tier gate is met. Default: 0.1.
Lowest tier (from detected-player level) at which the upgrade can roll. Default: 3.
Master switch. When false, patrols and raids keep their vanilla size and wave count. Default: true.
config.tribulation.raid_scaling.patrol_b: Tiers per extra patrol member: a captain adds tier / patrolBonusRate members (floored). 0 disables the patrol bonus. Default: 2.
config.tribulation.raid_scaling.extra_wa: Lowest tier (from the raid's targeted players) at which extra waves are added. Default: 4.
Number of extra waves added once the threshold tier is met. Default: 1.
Master switch. When false, targeting and spawn group sizes stay fully vanilla. Default: true.
config.tribulation.pack_tactics.tier_thr: Lowest tier at which pack tactics apply. Shared aggro uses the victim's frozen scaled tier; the spawn-group bonus uses the effective tier at the spawn position. Default: 3.
config.tribulation.pack_tactics.alert_ra: Radius (blocks) around the hurt mob searched for same-type packmates. Clamped to [0, 64]; 0 disables shared aggro. Default: 16.0.
config.tribulation.pack_tactics.group_si: Extra members added to natural spawn groups of eligible types above the threshold. Clamped to [0, 16]; mob caps still apply. Default: 2.
config.tribulation.environmental_pressur: Environmental Pressure
Master switch for environmental pressure effects. Default: false.
Debilitating Strikes
Enable Debilitating Strikes — high-tier mobs apply debuffs on hit. Default: true.
Debilitating Strikes Tier Threshold
Lowest scaled tier at which Debilitating Strikes apply. Default: 3.
Strikes Apply Weakness
Debilitating Strikes apply Weakness on hit. Default: true.
Weakness Duration (ticks)
Duration (ticks) of the Weakness applied on hit. Default: 100.
Weakness Amplifier
Amplifier of the Weakness applied on hit (0 = level I). Default: 0.
Strikes Apply Slowness
Debilitating Strikes apply Slowness on hit. Default: false.
Slowness Duration (ticks)
Duration (ticks) of the Slowness applied on hit. Default: 100.
Slowness Amplifier
Amplifier of the Slowness applied on hit (0 = level I). Default: 0.
Oppressive Nights
Enable Oppressive Nights — high-tier nights grow darker and sharpen mob senses. Default: true.
Oppressive Nights Tier Threshold
Lowest scaled tier at which Oppressive Nights take effect. Default: 4.
Night Darkness Strength
Strength of the night darkening effect (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.25.
Night Senses Follow-Range Multiplier
Follow-range multiplier applied to mobs on oppressive nights. Default: 1.5.
Show Night Darkness (this client)
Show the night darkening overlay on this client. Default: true.
config.tribulation.threat_particles.mini: Lowest tier that trails the generic cursed-mote cue (variant cues ignore this). Default: 4.
config.tribulation.threat_particles.part: Average ticks between particle emissions per mob (higher is sparser). Default: 40.
command.tribulation.hearts.self: You have lost %s half-hearts (%s/%s max HP)
item.tribulation.heart_fragment.tooltip: Right-click to restore a lost heart.
item.tribulation.heart_fragment.full: You have not lost any hearts.
item.tribulation.heart_fragment.info.res: Right-click to restore %s half-hearts lost to Hardcore Hearts.
item.tribulation.heart_fragment.info.dis: Hardcore Hearts is currently disabled on this world.
item.tribulation.heart_fragment.info.con: All values are configurable by the server operator.
enchantment.tribulation.soulbound.desc: Item is kept on death when Soul Inventory is active.
advancements.tribulation.root.title: Tribulation
advancements.tribulation.root.descriptio: Survive a world that grows deadlier the longer you live.
advancements.tribulation.tier_1.title: First Blood
advancements.tribulation.tier_2.title: Hardening
advancements.tribulation.tier_3.title: Trial by Fire
advancements.tribulation.tier_4.title: No Quarter
advancements.tribulation.tier_5.title: Apex Tribulation
advancements.tribulation.soulbound_survi: Carry a Soulbound item through your own death.
advancements.tribulation.shatter_shard_u: Use a Shatter Shard to lower your difficulty.
advancements.tribulation.heart_fragment_: Restore a lost heart with a Heart Fragment.
